scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && start-server-and-test start:test http://localhost:3010 cypress:run:test
scripts.test:e2e:open: npm run build && start-server-and-test start:test http://localhost:3010 cypress:open:test
scripts.test:load: npm run build && start-server-and-test start:test:mock http://localhost:3010 "cross-env BASE_URL=http://localhost:3010 MOCK_AI=1 node --experimental-vm-modules tests/load/load.js"
scripts.test:stress: npm run build && start-server-and-test start:test:mock http://localhost:3010 "cross-env BASE_URL=http://localhost:3010 MOCK_AI=1 node --experimental-vm-modules tests/load/load.js"
scripts.report:e2e:merge: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root='tests/reports/cypress';const dst=path.join(root,'merged.json');const walk=(d)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(d))return[];return fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((e)=>{const p=path.join(d,e.name);return e.isDirectory()?walk(p):[p]})};const files=walk(root).filter((p)=>p.toLowerCase().endsWith('.json')&&!p.toLowerCase().endsWith('merged.json'));if(!files.length){throw new Error('Missing Cypress report JSON under '+root)};fs.copyFileSync(files[0],dst);console.log('Created '+dst+' from '+files[0]);"
scripts.test:all: npm run report:clean && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e && npm run report:e2e:merge && npm run test:load && npm run report:summary
